change_summary: Attributed newly executed add-on-only 35pct cap-headroom events; found four benign target winners and no adverse subfamily.
hypothesis: Add-on-only 35pct cap headroom failed materiality because newly executable add-ons may have identifiable adverse-outcome contexts; measuring those contexts should tell whether the follow-through add-on branch needs a stronger trigger or should wait for forward evidence.
notes: Artifact: docs/experiments/artifacts/exp_20260426_043_addon_cap_headroom_loss_attribution.json. The materiality issue is limited sample/cap clipping, not an identifiable adverse family; avoid another nearby price-confirmation prefilter without new evidence.
